Off Calendar Sep-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-14-2013 Continued To Sep-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Bugatto for Petitioners.

Mr. Bugatto reported that he has filed the Amended Petition and the Supplemental Inventory this morning. The matter was continued to September 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the Amended Petition.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy M. Benton. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Either A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Further Status Report
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Continued To Nov-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court is aware that Attorney Benito Bugatto has passed away. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrators to appear on November 19, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-13-2012 Continued To Sep-10-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Bugatto for Richard Perino.

Mr. Bugatto explained that Benito Bugatto (Father) passed away, requested a continuance so that he could meet with the Petitioner and file a Substitution of Attorney, and stated that his Father did recieve the Inventory and Appraisal which he will file. The Court informed Mr. Bugatto that a verification of the petition was also needed. The status hearing was continued to September 10, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Report

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-02-2012 Continued To Aug-13-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Robert Bugatto for his father B. J. Bugatto (Attorney for the Co-Administrators).

Mr. Bugatto reported that his father is gravely ill and that the inventory was sent to the Probate Refree and they are close to completing the Petition for Final Distribution. The Court advised counsel that any petition and amended status report must be verified by the Administrators. All matters are continued to August 13, 2012 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-25-2012 Continued To Jul-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maria Buggato Secretary for Robert Buggato.

Ms. Buggato requested a continuance stating that the Substitute Attorney that was supposed to appear cancelled and that Attorney Robert Bugatto was in Los Angeles. Status on the accounting was continued to July 2, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos.
